Description: Pin is a small interactive control that toggles between pinned and unpinned states. It can be embedded within any part of a digital product — a panel, a toolbar, a card, or a dashboard widget — wherever a user may want to fix something in position or release it.

template.description: The HTML template for the pin component.

div.icon.description: The main container of the pin component, styled as a button.

svg.pinned.description: The SVG icon used for the pinned mode.

svg.unpinned.description: The SVG icon used for the unpinned mode.

visibility.description: Indicates whether the component is shown or hidden.

hide.description: Sets 'visibility' state to 'hidden' and hides the pin.

show.description: Sets 'visibility' state to 'visible' and shows the pin.

pin.description: Sets the 'status' to 'pinned', and pins the pin.

unpin.description: Sets the 'status' to 'unpinned', and unpins the pin.

onhide.description: Dispatched when pin 'visibility' state changes from 'visible' to 'hidden'.

parameters.name: detail
parameters.description: Contains the new visibility state of the component.

onshow.description: Dispatched when pin 'visibility' state changes from 'hidden' to 'visible'.

parameters.name: detail
parameters.description: Contains the new visibility state of the component.

onpin.description: Dispatched when pin 'status' changes from 'unpinned' to 'pinned'.

parameters.name: detail
parameters.description: Contains the new status of the component.

onunpin.description: Dispatched when pin 'status' changes from 'pinned' to 'unpinned'.

parameters.name: detail
parameters.description: Contains the new status of the component.

click.description: User clicks the icon to toggle the pin status.

hover.description: Changes the button appearance when hovered.
